body: Hey Amara, hope you're doing well — it's been a minute since we crossed paths at that climate tech summit back in the fall. I wanted to reach out because we're seeing a really interesting deal at [Tartan VC](tartan.vc) that I think sits squarely in your wheelhouse: an early-stage company building modular carbon capture hardware with an AI-optimized control layer. We're leading the seed round but are actively looking for a strong co-investor who can add strategic value on both the climate and infrastructure sides, and [Halfway Capital](halfway.vc) immediately came to mind. The team has impressive pedigree — two founders out of Climeworks and a third from DeepMind — and they've already got a pilot deployment running in partnership with a mid-size industrial operator in the Midwest. Happy to share the deck and arrange a founder call if there's appetite on your end. Let me know what you think!
